abstract: To attend: Please enroll here https://lu.ma/muqvquop 5:30pm - Networking 6:00pm - TechXChange Dev Day Meetup - Open Source AI in NYC for Developers Agenda will/may include as many as possible of these talks and demos Granite \- Open Source Models \- BJ Hargrave & Ming Zhang Docling \- Document processing\, parsing diverse formats \- Michele Dolfi LM Studio \- Your local AI toolkit & bringing it all together \- Yagil Burowski Bee AI \- Discover\, run\, and compose AI agents from any framework \- Shereen Bellamy LocalStack \- Develop and test your AI\-powered cloud apps locally \- Waldemar Hummer Panel for Q&A 7:30pm - Networking
title: Open Source AI in NYC
